name: tianxi-backend
description: 天喜娛樂 Tianxi Entertainment - 賽馬AI分析平台後端

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute tianxi-db --local --file=./src/db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute tianxi-db --local --file=./src/db/schema_v2.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute tianxi-db --remote --file=./src/db/schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute tianxi-db --remote --file=./src/db/schema_v2.sql
